title: Cannot access account
description: I am locked out of my account and cannot sign in to the portal.

title: VPN not working
description: My VPN keeps disconnecting every few minutes when I work from home.

title: Billing discrepancy
description: The invoice amount looks incorrect and I need someone to review the charge.

title: Password reset issue
description: I used the reset link but it keeps saying the token is invalid.

title: Laptop setup request
description: New employee starting Monday needs laptop setup, software access, and email configuration.

title: System outage
description: The internal dashboard is unavailable for the whole team and work is blocked.

title: Refund follow-up
description: I submitted a refund request last week and have not received any update yet.

title: Slow application performance
description: The app takes over a minute to load each page and times out sometimes.

title: Permission change needed
description: Please grant edit access to the shared folder for the finance team.

title: Urgent payment failure
description: A client payment did not go through and this needs immediate investigation.
